title: Trial and Error
text: Home * Programming * Algorithms * Trial and Error Chimpanzee is giving it a try [1] Trial and Error is a general problem solving method in contrast of an approach using insight and theory . In science, formulation and testing of hypotheses is based on trial and error, in computer science also called generate and test , and in elementary algebra , when solving certain equations, called guess and check . Learning and optimization methods such as genetic algorithms , simulated annealing and reinforcement learning also apply trial and error methods. In general, trial and error makes no attempt to discover why a solution works, but that it is a solution. A further application related to computer chess is to find factors for the application of Magic Bitboards with spare populated, but otherwise randomly chosen numbers .
